title: Harden Pack CLI Fault Isolation
summary: Return structured integration-import failures and keep the host CLI usable when unrelated registered packs are broken.
scope_items: Convert integration import-time failures into structured validation issues.
Stop eager all-pack host loading before CLI dispatch.
Keep command introspection deterministic under broken-pack conditions.
done_when_items: Pack validate returns failed results for import-time integration errors instead of raising.
Pack list, pack describe, and pack validate still run when another registered pack is broken.
Command introspection and command-index behavior remain deterministic with explicit degraded-pack reporting.
